recommended.song_name: Give Me Just A Little More Time

content:
Dionne Warwick - Déjà Vu (1979)
(written by Isaac Hayes & Adrienne Anderson)

YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R2ILm3bJLRY

[Intro]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]             [ch]A11[/ch]                     [ch]G#m9[/ch]        [ch]C#11[/ch]   [ch]C#7#5#9[/ch]
   This is insane. All you did was say hello, speak my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]G11[/ch]      [ch]G13[/ch]                        [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]E/F#[/ch]
   Feeling your love. Like a love I used to know; Long ago[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]            [ch]A11[/ch]                          [ch]G#m9[/ch]        [ch]C#11[/ch]   [ch]C#7#5#9[/ch]
   How can it be? We're a different space in time. Come to me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]G11[/ch]      [ch]G13[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]      [ch]B11[/ch] [ch]C#11[/ch]
   Feel Like I'm home, in a place I used to know; Long Ago[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab]      [ch]F#m9[/ch]
Déjà Vu[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]C#m11[/ch]
Could you be the dream that I once knew; Is it you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7#5#9[/ch] [ch]F#m9[/ch]
 Déjà  Vu[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]C#m11[/ch]          [ch]C#m11[/ch]
Could you be the dream that might come true; Shining through[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G#m7[/ch]                     [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I keep remembering me, I keep remembering you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m9[/ch]     [ch]C11[/ch] [ch]B11[/ch]
Déjà Vu[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]             [ch]A11[/ch]                        [ch]G#m9[/ch]        [ch]C#11[/ch]   [ch]C#7#5#9[/ch]
   This is divine; I've been waiting all my life; filling time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G11[/ch]           [ch]G13[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]E/F#[/ch]
   Looking for you, nights were more than you could know, long ago[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]            [ch]A11[/ch]                         [ch]G#m9[/ch]    [ch]C#11[/ch]      [ch]C#7#5#9[/ch]
  Come to me now; we don't have to dream of love, we know how[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G11[/ch]        [ch]G13[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]        [ch]B11[/ch] [ch]C#11[/ch]
  Somewhere before, it's as if I loved you so, so long ago[/tab]
